commands.name: openmeta machine doctor
commands.purpose: Check whether local configuration, credentials, directories, and automation prerequisites are ready for agent-driven use.

commands.name: openmeta machine config get
commands.purpose: Read the masked machine-safe configuration snapshot without exposing raw secrets.

commands.name: openmeta machine config set
commands.purpose: Set one configuration key and receive the masked resulting snapshot plus scheduler sync state.

commands.name: openmeta machine provider add
commands.purpose: Save a named LLM provider profile for later machine-safe activation.

commands.name: openmeta machine provider use
commands.purpose: Switch the active provider profile used by scout, analyze, and agent flows.

commands.name: openmeta machine scout
commands.purpose: Return ranked contribution opportunities in a stable JSON shape.

commands.name: openmeta machine analyze
commands.purpose: Analyze one repository, generate a suggested patch and PR draft, and return artifact locations.

commands.name: openmeta machine agent
commands.purpose: Execute the full contribution flow, from issue selection through artifacts and optional PR creation.
dangerousExecutionNotes: Only run when the user explicitly asks for execution.
Prefer --dry-run for previews and --draft-only for artifact-only operation.
Review executionOutcome, reviewRequired, validationResults, and pullRequestUrl before claiming completion.

commands.name: openmeta machine runs
commands.purpose: Inspect machine-safe run history or one specific run record.

commands.name: openmeta machine inbox
commands.purpose: Read the persisted ranked opportunity backlog.

commands.name: openmeta machine pow
commands.purpose: Read proof-of-work records, publication state, and stored artifact references.
